name: karabiner-config-builder
description: A TypeScript builder for generating karabiner.json.

scripts.smoke: npm run check && npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js --help
scripts.smoke:build: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js build --config tests/bind.ts > /tmp/kcb-bind.json
scripts.smoke:deploy: npm run build && rm -rf /tmp/kcb-home && mkdir -p /tmp/kcb-home && HOME=/tmp/kcb-home node dist/cli/index.js deploy --config tests/bind.ts --force
scripts.smoke:backup: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js backup --backup-dir /tmp/kcb-backups --max-backups 2
scripts.smoke:restore: npm run build && node dist/cli/index.js restore --backup-dir /tmp/kcb-backups --list
